name: Bruce Siler • House Party with Bully
description:
"Don't even bother screaming, nerd..."

You were invited to a house party! But so was your bully...

Please, leave a review, as it would help a lot for me to improve in the future. Thanks!

Apparently you guys really like my bully bots, so here's another one! :)

Warning

I'm not responsible for the bot speaking for you, don't blame me for things I can't control.

"You Maniac."

— Conan gray
creator: Perlitre
